name_en: Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
Original leather with sheepskin lining, accurate to the original, ZP spring buckle
Lady Diana 4-compartment Lake Blue series, the latest color for spring and summer, fresh style🆕, paired with the latest letter shoulder strap😋, which is a plus. 6 letters included⚠️, you can choose your favorite buckle freely🙋🏻, no need to match a full set
size:20*8*17cm
